message:
fix: use factory.NewFromConfig in auto-migrate to respect backend config (dolt-test-vdvj)

autoMigrateOnVersionBump() was calling sqlite.New() directly, ignoring the
configured backend. On Dolt backend, this either failed to open a non-existent
SQLite file or opened the wrong database.

Changed the function to accept beadsDir instead of dbPath, load the config to
determine the correct database path for the backend, and use
factory.NewFromConfig() to open the correct storage backend (SQLite or Dolt)
based on metadata.json configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
